creator: mistral@imasy.or.jp
text:
Some sites listed in ports/Mk/bsd.sites.mk are not avaiable now.
	I looked up every site in the file and found 24 sites has no A/AAAA
	records (name lookup failed).

	I'm not sure those sites are gone or temporally not available,
	and I have not tested the rest of the list are really available and
        fetchable.
